routing_engine.name: AI Project Routing Engine
routing_engine.description: Automatic routing of projects to appropriate teams based on skill matching, priority, and authority levels

output.reason: Best match based on skills and authority level

primary.name: skill_based
primary.description: Routes projects based on required skills matching available roles

fallback.name: round_robin
fallback.description: Falls back to round-robin when skill match is ambiguous

required.description: Project department must match role department
Required skills must match role capabilities
Role authority must meet project impact threshold

optional.description: Consider current task load of role
